memberdef.name: HIPDNN_CHECK_ERROR
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ auto err = x; \ if(err.is_bad()) \ { \ return err; \ } \ } while(0)

briefdescription.para: Check an Error return value and propagate if an error occurred.

detaileddescription.para:
x
Expression returning an Error object
This macro evaluates the expression and returns immediately if the result indicates an error (is_bad() returns true).

memberdef.name: HIPDNN_RETURN_IF_NE
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ if(x != y) \ { \ return {error_status, message}; \ } \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: HIPDNN_RETURN_IF_EQ
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ if(x == y) \ { \ return {error_status, message}; \ } \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: HIPDNN_RETURN_IF_NULL
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ if(x == nullptr) \ { \ return {error_status, message}; \ } \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: HIPDNN_RETURN_IF_LT
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ if(x < y) \ { \ return {error_status, message}; \ } \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: HIPDNN_RETURN_IF_GE
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ if(x >= y) \ { \ return {error_status, message}; \ } \ } while(0)

memberdef.name: HIPDNN_RETURN_IF_LE
memberdef.initializer: do \ { \ if(x <= y) \ { \ return {error_status, message}; \ } \ } while(0)

briefdescription.para: Error handling types and macros for the hipDNN Frontend API.

detaileddescription.para: This file defines the error handling infrastructure used throughout the hipDNN frontend. It includes error codes, the Error struct for detailed error information, and helper macros for error checking and propagation.
